summary: CSS polish testing complete for J&B Tasoitus ja Maalaus service pages. All visual improvements verified including card shadows, hover effects, reduced padding, and improved visual balance.
passed_tests: Service page /tasoitustyot-helsinki loads correctly with H1: 'Tasoitustyöt Helsingissä'
Service page /maalaustyot-helsinki loads correctly with H1: 'Maalaustyöt Helsingissä'
Service page /mikrosementti-helsinki loads correctly with H1: 'Mikrosementti Helsingissä'
Feature cards have box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) 0px 2px 8px, 0px 4px 16px
Feature cards have hover effect with translateY(-6px) and enhanced shadow
Project cards (related services) have box-shadow with hover transform translateY(-8px)
Benefits-box has soft gradient background and blue-tinted shadow rgba(0, 86, 210, 0.08)
Why-item list items have proper styling with hover transform translateX(4px)
Area-tags have rounded corners (8px) and hover effect with color change
Contact-card has box-shadow and proper border-radius (16px)
Process section displays 4 numbered steps with connector lines
Trust badges section shows 4 badges (Vuodesta 2018, Ammattitaitoinen työ, Kotitalousvähennys, Tyytyväisyystakuu)
Navigation links work correctly (Palvelut → /#palvelut, Meistä → /#meista)
Contact form section has 5 input fields and submit button
Related services section shows 3 service cards
Strong CTA section before footer is visible
Footer has dark background (#0F172A) with proper text contrast
All images load correctly (no broken images)
Text contrast is good: Hero text rgb(15, 23, 42), body text rgb(100, 116, 139)
GET /api/service-pages returns all published service pages
GET /api/service-pages/{slug} returns correct page data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service page CSS polish complete. All card shadows, hover effects, and visual improvements verified working. Feature cards have shadow and hover lift effect. Benefits box has gradient and blue shadow. Why-items have hover slide effect. Area tags have hover color change. Service pages verified: /tasoitustyot-helsinki, /maalaustyot-helsinki, /mikrosementti-helsinki.
